description: Style Notemumbai slang sets cosmo street trends with this kurti. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting leggings or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished slippers.Product DetailsTeal woven kurti, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, embroidery on the yoke, chest button placket, three fourth sleeves with mid button tabs and a curved hemMaterial and CareBlended cottonWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8"and chest 32") is wearing a size M
